resources.string: Search for music and add it to your library
Downloads will be available on Desktop soon
Albums will appear here when available on Desktop
Local downloads are not available on Desktop yet
Library artists will show up here
Library albums will show up here
Do you really want to remove all \"%s\" playlist songs from the Downloaded Songs storage?
Do you really want to delete the playlist \"%s\"?
Note: This allows for syncing with YouTube Music. This is NOT changeable later.
Best quality is listed first. Pick the format you want to keep offline.
Includes embedded cover art and tags
M4A 128kbps+ includes embedded cover art and metadata. Lower bitrate M4A and OPUS files will not have embedded metadata.
The song is already in your playlist
%d songs are already in your playlist
Use login for browsing more content
This can shows more content if you are logged in with YTMusic account
Enable Android themed launcher icon support
Force the display to run at the highest supported refresh rate (e.g. 120Hz)
Use colors from the current cover art
Swipe song to right for play next or left for adding to queue
Use pure black in dark mode (OLED)
Fine-tune how large UI elements appear
Enter a value between 50% and 120%. Lower values show more content, higher values make everything larger.
Tap again to copy or edit

This is an ADVANCED login method. As an alternative to the web portal, you may directly enter or update your login token here. For example, this can speed up logging in on multiple devices. Please note that any invalid token formats the app fails to parse will not be accepted
YouTube cookie missing. Paste the full advanced token.
Not available on desktop. Use advanced login.
Automatically sync with your YouTube Music account
Restore your last queue when the app starts
Automatically add more songs when the end of the queue is reached, if possible
Start radio when the queue ends
Automatically add more similar songs when the end of the queue is reached
Auto skip to next song when error occurs
Automatically download songs when you like them
Automatically download lyrics for downloaded songs
Requires FFmpeg installed on the system
Free space by removing temporary files
Images and cached data will be removed. Downloaded songs will not be affected.
Are you sure you want to clear all listen history?
Are you sure you want to clear all search history?
Remove tokens, cookies, and private credentials from this device.
This will remove saved account credentials and tokens. Continue?
Reset local app data and settings without deleting downloaded songs.
All local app data will be reset. Downloaded songs will be preserved.
When this option is on, screenshots and the app\'s view in Recents are disabled.

AniTail uses the KizzyRPC library to set your Discord account\'s status. This involves using the Discord Gateway connection, which may be considered a violation of Discord\'s TOS. However, there are no known cases of user accounts being suspended for this reason. Use at your own risk.\n\nAnitail will only extract your token, and everything else is stored locally.
Note: Adding local songs to synced/remote playlists is unsupported. Any other combination is valid
Logged in as %1$s. Found %2$d playlists.\n\nNow, select the items you want to import:
1. Visit Spotify for developers dashboard and click on "Create app".
2. Enter the necessary details and use http://127.0.0.1:8888 as the Redirect URIs.
3. Make sure to click "Add" once you ve entered the local path above.
4. Toggle Web API. The checkbox should now have a tick mark.
5. Accept the terms of service and click "Save".
You’ll be redirected to a new page. Click on Settings, then copy the Client ID and Client Secret, and paste them into the text fields below in this app.

Now, click the Authorize and Continue button below and login with your account from which you want to import from, and Authorize and Continue, which will redirect you to a site which should start from http://127.0.0.1:8888/?code=\n\nPaste that entire URL in the below text field which says Authorization Code and click the Authenticate button.
Dont close the app or go back. This operation doesn t run in the background, so stay put until it s done!
Where should the liked songs be imported?
If you\'d like to support the project financially, you can do so via Patreon. Your contribution helps us grow and improve!
Backup and restore your settings, playlists, and other data. This feature allows you to easily transfer your data between devices or restore it in case of data loss.
Back up your playlists, settings, and data
Restore your data from a previous backup
Import playlists from M3U files (will search automatically)
Import playlists from CSV files (will search automatically)
You can share this link so others can download your backup. Remember that your backup will be available for 14 days.
Error uploading backup. Please try again.
Automatically upload your backup to a temporary cloud storage for sharing
Create a server that other devices can connect to
Connect to another device running JAM
Connect and sync your music with other devices
Automatically check for and download new updates
Downloading the latest version of AniTail
Configure automatic backup frequency, location, and retention
Select a custom folder for auto backups
Save downloads to a custom folder (e.g., SD card)
When enabled: Turbo mode (faster downloads, higher battery/data usage).
Custom location unavailable, falling back to internal storage
Backup scheduled and will start in a few seconds
Select a folder (e.g. in Google Drive) to automatically sync your backups to the cloud.
Automatically backup to your Google Drive
Enter your Last.fm credentials to enable scrobbling and track loving.
Are you sure you want to logout from Last.fm?
Automatically scrobble tracks to your Last.fm profile
Automatically love/unlove tracks when you like/unlike them
Learn more about Last.fm music discovery and recommendations
No top tracks data available. Listen to more music to see your statistics!
No top artists data available. Listen to more music to see your statistics!
Are you sure you want to remove all downloaded songs? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to clear the song cache? This will free up space but might affect playback performance temporarily.
Are you sure you want to clear the image cache? Album art and artist images will need to be re-downloaded.
Allow casting media to compatible devices. Requires Google Play Services.
Cast functionality requires Google Play Services to be available on your device.
EXPERIMENTAL: Detect language line by line
The Cyrillic language will be detected line by line instead of the entire song.

This is a hit or miss experimental feature. 

By default, language is determined from the whole song, but with this option on, it will be determined line by line instead. This will allow multi-language songs to work BUT the language might not always be correct (for example if there is a Ukrainian lyric that doesn't contain any Ukrainian-specific letters, it might be romanized as Russian instead). 

If you do not have issues, it is recommended to keep this option off.
Use the offload audio path for audio playback. Disabling this may increase power usage but can be useful if you experience issues with audio playback or post processing
An unexpected error occurred. Please share the crash report to help us fix the issue.
Sign in to access your library, playlists, and personalized recommendations.
More stats coming soon on Desktop.
Play a song to see the lyrics
Tip: move closer to the speaker and avoid background noise.
Tip: check your internet connection and try again.
I recognized "%1$s" by %2$s on AniTail Music.%3$s
Are you sure you want to clear recognition history?
You listened to %1$d songs since joining AniTail
Keep listening to unlock richer monthly insights about your music habits.
